mapper.select: SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.rem_std AS remStd, l.status FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(l.credit), 0) FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.rem_std AS remStd, l.status FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attendance WHERE course_id = (SELECT course_id FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND member_id = #{memberId})
DELETE FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND member_id = #{memberId};
